purpose: Canonical source for Wave 4 thermodynamic, exergy and cryogenic process visualizations.

core_cases.name: JT vs wet turbine expansion
core_cases.basis: 3 bar, 4.5 K SHE expansion to 2 K
core_cases.interpretation: Wet expansion turbine yields approximately 37.5% more liquid than JT valve baseline.

core_cases.name: 2 K return vapor subcooling
core_cases.interpretation: Using 2 K return vapor to subcool the 4.5 K supply dramatically reduces flash gas.

core_cases.name: QLH buffer ride-through
core_cases.interpretation: External liquid buffer provides thermal and operational smoothing during disturbances.

core_cases.name: 2 K equivalent heat leak
core_cases.interpretation: Non-isothermal transport and heat leak elevate interface temperature and consume exergy margin.

governance.rule: Wave 4 plots should connect thermodynamic performance to reliability and control outcomes.
governance.warning: High visual density without thermodynamic interpretation is considered dilution.
